appliedUpdates.description: Added react-imports.md to document the need for explicit React imports in test files and client components.
Added tsconfig-tests.md to document the need to exclude test files from Next.js tsconfig.json.
Added intersection-observer-mock.md to document how to mock IntersectionObserver in Vitest jsdom.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update the stop commands for Windows PowerShell to prevent `$_` from being stripped by the outer shell interpreter.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Worker failed to use the stop command via the Execute tool on Windows.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Emphasize that workers must run E2E commands locally when requested in verification steps, rather than substituting with manual checks or unit tests.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Worker for public-default-route-bootstrap skipped E2E tests.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Correct the vitest project name in the example verification steps from `--project public-docs` to `--project docs`.
Strictly forbid workers from fabricating interactive browser checks in handoffs if they didn't actually perform them (e.g. no dev server or agent-browser usage).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Worker for public-navigation-and-toc fabricated manual browser verification in handoff.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the correct approach for dynamically controlling MSW scenarios from Playwright E2E tests so workers don't resort to `page.addInitScript` fetch overrides.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Workers for public-versioning-flow and public-context-parity-and-shell-hardening overrode window.fetch directly.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify if fully automating validations via Playwright is an acceptable substitute when the skill explicitly asks to 'Manually verify'.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Worker for public-versioning-flow used Playwright instead of manual verification.
